0.text: Minimal fibroatelectasis changes in the middle lobe of the right lung

1.text: Minimal fibroatelectasis changes in the inferior lingular segment of the left lung

2.text: Calcified, nonspecific parenchymal nodule measuring 3 mm in the superior segment of the right lower lobe

3.text: Contour irregularities in the pleura in the posterobasal segments of both lower lobes suggestive of scarring
